summary: Converted the Path Map route into a compact connected level rail with a shared route spine, animated runner, focused-node socket, direct Path deep-link landing, and responsive overflow checks.
changes: Added path-route-spine and path-route-runner markup to Path Map route rendering.
Converted the route from a wrapping card grid into a horizontal scroll-snap level rail to reduce vertical scrolling.
Moved the connected route above the Chapter Archive so the level map appears before deep records.
Added focusPathBoardFromRoute so direct Path Map URLs land on the active board instead of the top of the long app.
Added reduced-motion handling for route runner and focused-node pulse.

verification.pytest: 27 passed, 55 deselected with python -m pytest tests -q -k agent_company_atlas

sources: Gamification design references visible progress and feedback as useful game elements.
Dashboard references favor at-a-glance views with drilldown over overloaded long pages.
